summary: Corrective attempt 2 confirms MZ-601 is complete as a QA/test-design task. The US-846 matrix exposes the remaining PERSONAL-AC-2431 deterministic full-bullet smoke gap and now classifies it as explicit downstream ownership for MZ-602, with MZ-603 regression verification and MZ-604 release-readiness gates. MZ-601 is ready to accept; PERSONAL-US-846 is not release-ready until the downstream executable smoke gap is closed and verified.

tests_run.evidence: Read active Spexus tenant/project/component scope before reading task artifacts. Active project PERSONAL, component default.
Confirmed [MZ-601] US-846 QA coverage matrix is qa-test-design implementation work for PERSONAL-EP-180 and must expose missing test owners before final verification.
Re-read attempt-1 matrix and confirmed it already identified the full-bullet smoke gap and named MZ-602, MZ-603, and MZ-604 as downstream owners.
Confirmed attempt-1 report was structurally useful but invalid for orchestrator acceptance because it combined status=succeeded with non-empty risks and failure_type=release_readiness_gap.

tests_run.command: rg -n "fullBulletSmoke|runDeterministicSmoke|keeps state valid after several legal actions|phase.*finished|illegal|stuck" src/test/integrationHarness.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: Confirmed current smoke evidence is short-horizon only: integrationHarness.test uses maxSteps: 12, integrationHarness reserves fullBulletSmoke for future full-bullet work, and engine.test contains only a short playable-loop smoke plus unrelated targeted finished-state checks.

Confirmed existing project verification entrypoints are npm run test, npm run build, and npm run verify. Broad suites were not run because this corrective task only edits QA/report artifacts and required lightweight file/JSON checks.
Verified the updated matrix is non-empty.

tests_run.command: rg -n "Downstream Gap Routing|downstream-gap-routed|MZ-601 is ready to accept|MZ-602|MZ-603|MZ-604" docs/test-design/us-846-rule-critical-coverage-matrix.md
tests_run.evidence: Verified the updated matrix explicitly routes the remaining full-bullet smoke, regression, and release-readiness gates to downstream owners.
Verified attempt-2 report is valid JSON.

verification_environment.broad_test_suite_omission_reason: Corrective attempt 2 only clarifies QA design/report routing. Existing project verification entrypoints were identified, but broad test execution is downstream MZ-603 scope after MZ-602 implements the missing full-bullet smoke.

evidence_matrix.scenario: QA/test-design task must expose missing test owners before final verification.
evidence_matrix.limitations: MZ-601 does not implement executable tests; it defines and routes the matrix.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Trace all rule-critical behavior categories to current executable coverage or downstream owner.
evidence_matrix.limitations: All areas except full-bullet smoke are mapped to existing executable evidence. Full-bullet smoke remains required before US-846 release acceptance.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Rule-critical unit and integration coverage exists for deck/deal, bidding, legal actions, trick winner, whist, all-pass, misere, scoring, persistence, and AI legality.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: docs/test-design/us-846-rule-critical-coverage-matrix.md; src/domain/cards.test.ts; src/domain/rules.test.ts; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/domain/scoring.test.ts; src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts; src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts; src/test/*.integration.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Fresh regression execution is intentionally assigned to MZ-603, not claimed by this report.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Deterministic seed plus simple AI full-bullet smoke must complete without unhandled error, illegal AI action, or stuck actor.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: rg -n "fullBulletSmoke|runDeterministicSmoke|keeps state valid after several legal actions|phase.*finished|illegal|stuck" src/test/integrationHarness.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Current repo has short-horizon smoke scaffolding only. This is visible and routed; it is not an unresolved MZ-601 risk.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Do not hide executable gap; route closure to named downstream tasks.
evidence_matrix.limitations: MZ-602 must produce executable evidence; MZ-603 must rerun regression verification; MZ-604 must decide release readiness from current evidence.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Acceptance applies only to the QA/test-design task, not to US-846 release readiness.
MZ-602 still must implement the deterministic full-bullet smoke test.
MZ-603 must rerun the relevant unit, integration, and new smoke coverage after MZ-602.
US-846 remains not release-ready until MZ-604 sees executable evidence for PERSONAL-AC-2431.
Schema validation is by required field presence and JSON parsing; no broad test suite was needed for this docs/report correction.
Static localStorage browser-app scope with no auth/backend boundary in this task.
